Now I will teach you Mouth.<[silence:60ms]>

Mouth is the wet cave in face-hole where food goes.<[silence:60ms]> Teeth bite, tongue pushes—like hand but soft and inside.<[silence:60ms]> Air comes out fast when you grunt or shout.<[silence:60ms]> When cold, breath makes mist like fire-smoke from nose.<[silence:60ms]> If you poke with finger, it feels slippery, warm—same as animal meat when fresh.<[silence:60ms]>
clean_story:
Now I will teach you Mouth.

Mouth is the wet cave in face-hole where food goes. Teeth bite, tongue pushes—like hand but soft and inside. Air comes out fast when you grunt or shout. When cold, breath makes mist like fire-smoke from nose. If you poke with finger, it feels slippery, warm—same as animal meat when fresh.
